name: Project Health Baselines
description: Capture AI responses as immutable, versioned project health baselines with diff, promotion, and audit trail (PRD #294). Tools: baseline.create, baseline.list, baseline.get, baseline.promote, baseline.archive, baseline.diff, baseline.active.

maxBaselinesPerProject.description: Hard cap on baselines stored per project

auditLogPath.description: File path for tamper-evident audit logs (empty string = in-memory only)

diffTokenBudget.description: Maximum tokens buffed for diff computation (per PRD AC-8)
